top_signals.title: phpBB forum fixes auth bypass bug lurking for a decade
top_signals.summary: A 10-year-old authentication bypass vulnerability discovered in the phpBB forum software allows an attacker to log in as any user, including administrators. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Small investors scrambled to get in on the SpaceX IPO, even as some believe the valuation is 'stupid'
top_signals.summary: SpaceX set a fixed price of $135 per share in the leadup to its IPO on Friday, placing its valuation at $1.77 trillion. Shares rallied more than 25%.
